issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasAnyType' (checking if Leader is multicolored), not 'HasCardOnBoard'. LeaderHasAnyType is the correct DSL condition for checking Leader properties.

Action 'GiveDon' is incorrect. The effect 'set up to 4 of your DON!! cards as active' means activating (resting) existing DON!!, not giving new DON!!. Should use 'Rest' or similar activation mechanic. Current DSL creates DON!! instead of activating them.

Missing second effect: 'you cannot play Character cards with a base cost of 5 or more during this turn' is a restriction that must be encoded as a separate effect with duration 'DuringYourTurn' and appropriate blocking logic.
